title: Central Pharmacy Pharmacist
content:
Central Pharmacy Pharmacist
Publix Supermarkets, Inc.
Thank you, Oneisys
From: Stephanie Perez &[REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]>
Sent: Thursday, February 8, 2024 9:41 PM
To: Echenique, Oneisys (MDC Foundation) &[REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS]>
Subject: RE: 2024 MDC Alumni Hall of Fame - Congratulations!
********************** EXTERNAL EMAIL **********************

PLEASE USE CAUTION WHEN CLICKING LINKS OR ATTACHMENTS

Good evening Oneisys,
Hope this email finds you well! Thank you so much for reaching out. I am honored to be inducted into the 2024 MDC Alumni Hall of Fame! Please information requested attached and bio questions below. Should you need anything else, please do not hesitate to contact me. Look forward to hearing from you soon!


1. What does Miami Dade College mean to you?
Miami Dade College represents a transformative journey of education and personal growth, providing me with the foundation and opportunities to pursue my career aspirations as a pharmacist. It's a vibrant community that fosters diversity, resilience, and a commitment to lifelong learning.
